$comment: Windy Fly (windy-agent) — Class A retrofit. Fly is both patient and doctor. Its control surface is NOT HTTP routes and NOT a Loom-woven JS proxy: it is a NATIVE Python MCP server (src/windyfly/mcp_server/) that projects Fly's in-process Capability Plane over MCP — tools/list = registry.tool_schemas_for_band(caller_band), tools/call = registry.invoke (band-gated + audited for free). The doctrine calls this 'a serialization shim' (§2). Therefore this manifest does NOT statically enumerate every tool (the registry is dynamic and band-filtered per caller); it declares the HEALING BASELINE Fly must expose so an outside agent can heal a wedged Fly, mapped to Fly's real capability ids, with gaps marked honestly. Conformance for Class A is STRUCTURAL: the MCP tool list must equal the Capability Plane's band-filtered schemas (proven in tests/test_mcp_control_bridge.py), and the baseline capabilities below must be present.

baseline_mapping.$comment: The 13-knob baseline mapped onto Fly's Capability Plane. 'implemented' = a real capability exists; 'gap' = Fly should grow this capability (punch list). These names are the DOCTRINE roles; Fly's real capability ids are in maps_to.

get_health.note: health.* capability family already reports agent health + repair knobs.

get_config.note: config is edited via raw windyfly.toml + config.reload; no read-config capability yet.

get_logs.note: scrub content before exposing over MCP.

get_capabilities.note: the registry IS the capability probe; band-filtered.

reconnect.note: offline.status observes; no explicit reconnect capability.

restart_app.note: restart is out-of-band (systemd) — needs a supervisor beyond bare Restart=; §7.

set_setting.note: typed sliders exist; wants a catalog + undo like Word's.

check_for_update.note: wire to the Steamroller fleet version manifest (L2).

apply_update.note: attested self-update + last-known-good; agent updates itself is delicate — always_confirm, OWNER band.

reset_to_defaults.note: personality.rollback / soul restore exist but no full factory reset.

tools.name: health.recent
tools.description: Read Windy Fly's own recent health — is the agent online, are its model providers reachable, is it in a crash loop. The FIRST tool when the user says their agent is acting up or has gone quiet.

tools.name: health.list_repair_knobs
tools.description: List the specific things that can be done to repair Windy Fly right now, each as a concrete follow-up action. This is the doctor's 'here is the wrench' — every health finding names its remediation.

$tools_note: Only two example capabilities are enumerated here to anchor the contract; the LIVE surface is the full band-filtered Capability Plane served by the native server, NOT this static list. See baseline_mapping for the healing coverage and docs/handoffs/FLY-LANE-2026-07-13.md (windy-contracts) for the build order.
